title: Goniophlebium rosei
taxonomy: Goniophlebium rosei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. It belongs to the genus Goniophlebium, which is a group of ferns that are native to tropical regions of Asia. Within the family Polypodiaceae, Goniophlebium rosei is further classified as a member of the subfamily Polypodioideae. The classification of Goniophlebium rosei is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and venation pattern. This classification helps to distinguish Goniophlebium rosei from other species of ferns in the same family.
